root_cause: No dedicated GET /api/sessions/{id}/messages endpoint existed. The web fallback (db-web-fallback.ts) for the 'SELECT * FROM messages WHERE session_id = ?' query was calling GET /api/sessions/{id} (the full session detail endpoint) and extracting detail.messages, but this approach is fragile: any 404 or unexpected response shape silently returns an empty array. A dedicated /messages endpoint is cleaner, returns a flat array directly, and avoids loading the full session object just to get its messages.

changes.crates/ava-tui/src/web/api.rs: Added get_session_messages() handler: GET /api/sessions/{id}/messages returns Vec<MessageSummary> as a flat JSON array
changes.crates/ava-tui/src/web/mod.rs: Registered .route("/api/sessions/{id}/messages", get(api::get_session_messages)) and updated doc comment
changes.src/services/db-web-fallback.ts: Updated 'from messages where session_id' branch to call GET /api/sessions/{id}/messages (dedicated endpoint) with fallback to GET /api/sessions/{id} for older servers
changes.src/lib/api-client.ts: Added get_session_messages to COMMAND_TO_ENDPOINT map pointing to /api/sessions/{id}/messages
